notes: Renderer/surface request cannot upgrade wordingStrengthCap beyond the typed outline.
Renderer/surface cannot create a lead when CommentaryOutline has no lead.
Renderer/surface cannot reorder lead/support/context buckets.
Renderer/surface cannot convert source context or retrieval snippets into current-position truth.
Renderer/surface cannot discard suppression reasons to revive a claim.
Renderer/surface cannot strengthen a qualified S07/S08/S21 selector outline into assertive certified wording.
Renderer/surface cannot upgrade S15/S16 passer-structure outline context into winning passer, passed-pawn result, or forced-conversion wording.
Renderer/surface cannot upgrade S17/S18/S19/S22 relief, simplification, or hold outline into winning, drawing, result, or forced-conversion wording without selector certification.
Renderer/surface cannot upgrade S01/S02/S03/S04 king-attack pressure into mate, winning attack, forced result, or best-move wording without certified owner evidence.
Renderer/surface cannot upgrade engine-certified eval swing into best move, winning, or forced-result wording without selector-admitted certified owner evidence.
Renderer/surface cannot upgrade opening, motif, endgame-study, or retrieval context into current-position truth, best move, result, forced line, or theory-proof wording.
Outline builder maps wordingStrengthCap to wordingRules.maxStrength and cannot raise the cap.
Outline builder carries selector evidenceRefs as references and cannot recompute proof text, raw engine interpretation, or source truth.
Outline builder cannot merge master_reference and online_trend, rank opening context as truth, or move specific game/player/event citation out of retrieval.
Renderer contract consumes CommentaryPlan only and does not consume raw selector claims, raw engine packets, or raw source rows as truth.
Renderer preserves blocked claims as non-public suppression metadata and cannot expose blocked claims as public commentary by default.
Renderer noCommentary and hidden outputs remain silent and cannot emit fallback broad chess narration.
Renderer carries only plan.evidence refs and cannot infer evidence from selected claim-local refs or lower carriers.

Renderer may carry bounded Certification refs and same-binding Certification-paired EngineCertification refs already in the plan, but RawEngine refs, evals, PVs, engine packets, and unpaired EngineCertification refs are not public render evidence.
Minimal renderer keeps role labels such as Primary, Support, Context, and Contrast as structured RenderRole data only; they are not public explanation text.
Renderer treats plan.blocked as a deny-list even if a malformed plan also places the same claim in a selected section; blocked-only evidence and boundary metadata are not public.
Renderer exposes EngineCertification refs only when bounded, same-binding Certification evidence and same-binding typed board reason evidence are already present in plan.evidence.
Renderer does not expose plan-wide EngineCertification evidence through an Sxx/projection block; EngineCertification refs require public Certification-layer selected-claim ownership.
